notes: CEILING.MATH negative-number baseline with default mode.

CEILING.PRECISE aligns with CEILING.MATH mode 0 on the admitted slice.
Legacy FLOOR positive baseline.
Legacy FLOOR negative/sign-sensitive baseline.
FLOOR.MATH negative-number baseline with default mode.

ISO.CEILING aligns with CEILING.MATH mode 0 on the admitted slice.

MDETERM seeded 2x2 determinant baseline.
MINVERSE spilled result is materialized row-major for stable replay comparison.
MMULT seeded matrix-vector product materialized row-major.
MUNIT 3x3 identity baseline.
Scalar numeric input is treated as a 1x1 matrix for MDETERM.
Scalar numeric input is treated as a 1x1 matrix for MINVERSE.
Scalar numeric inputs are treated as 1x1 matrices for MMULT.
MUNIT truncates fractional size toward zero.
MDETERM rejects non-square matrices.
MINVERSE rejects singular matrices.
MMULT rejects shape mismatch.
SUMPRODUCT seeded baseline.
SUMPRODUCT treats logical cells as zero after dereference.
SUMPRODUCT treats text cells as zero after dereference.
SUMPRODUCT scalar baseline.
SUMX2MY2 seeded baseline.
SUMX2PY2 seeded baseline.
SUMXMY2 seeded baseline.

SERIESSUM seeded baseline.
SERIESSUM admits numeric text only for scalar x.
